name: schema-registry-dag-schema-history-tracker
description: T201 SchemaHistoryTracker — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Records schema publication history. Appends version record to history index. Immutable records — never update.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: immutable append-only records, triggered by SchemaPublished, never updates existing history records, tenant-scoped
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern + immutable-append + history-tracking + event-sourcing patterns for T201

Break T201 into: consume SchemaPublished → build history record with tenantId+schemaId+version+publishedAt → storeDocument with unique history record ID → NEVER updateDocument or deleteDocument for history

Generate schema-history-tracker.service.ts — @EventPattern('SchemaPublished'), builds SchemaHistoryRecord with immutable fields (tenantId, schemaId, version, publishedAt, publishedBy). Uses storeDocument() ONLY — NEVER updateDocument or deleteDocument on history records. Record ID includes version to ensure uniqueness. Tenant-scoped from ALS.
Named check validation: append_only_no_update, record_id_includes_version, tenant_scoped_from_als, never_delete_history, event_pattern_schema_published
Score generated code 0-100 against T201 iron rules: immutable append, unique versioned record ID, tenant isolation, no update/delete operations
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=append-only-storeDocument+unique-version-id+tenant-scoped, rejected=updateDocument-on-history OR deleteDocument-on-history OR non-unique-record-id. curriculumTier=1.
